name: Gansu Shangfeng Cement Co.,Ltd
summary: Gansu Shangfeng Cement Co.,Ltd manufactures and sells cement and cement clinker in China. It also provides aggregates, concrete, and other building materials, as well as engages in the real estate business. The company was formerly known as Baiyin Copper Commercial Building (Group) Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Gansu Shangfeng Cement Co.,Ltd in April 2013. Gansu Shangfeng Cement Co.,Ltd was founded in 1978 and is based in Hangzhou, China.
